Section Title: Andrej Karpathy > Activity > 125K followers
Content:
[Andrej Karpathy](https://www.linkedin.com/in/andrej-karpathy-9a650716)Andrej Karpathy4y[Andrej Karpathy shared this](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/andrej-karpathy-9a650716_tesla-tsla-autopilot-activity-6891853901331623936-rg9r)I am hiring Deep Learning Engineers for the Tesla AI team. Strong software engineering is the primary requirement. Except for the scientist role, deep learning interest or knowledge is only a bonus (we will teach you). For the deep learning scientist role any domain outside of computer vision (e.g. speech, NLP, etc.) works great too.

Section Title: Andrej Karpathy > Explore more posts
Content:
💡 Instead of scaling up, in Ferret-UI Lite, we focused on scaling down, and present our lessons from building small on-device GUI agents. 🔗 arXiv: https://lnkd.in/gWyYNejc 📔 Ferret-UI Lite is 3B in size. We conduct both SFT and RL, for both grounding and navigation, and across mobile, web and desktop platforms. 1️⃣ Ferret-UI Lite achieves strong results on GUI grounding (e.g., 53.3% on ScreenSpot-Pro and 61.2% on OSWorld-G), surpassing many larger models. We found that RL with zoom-in is effective to improve performance. 2️⃣ For navigation, Ferret-UI Lite achieves success rates of 28.0% on AndroidWorld and 19.8% on OSWorld, outperforming other 3B agents. But its performance can still be limited. We found carefully designed RLVR reward is important for training such small agents. We hope our lessons will inform future research on building efficient, capable, and practical on-device AI agents. Led by Zhen Yang Zi-Yi Dou Di Feng
